description:
TokenPrices.glpPrice(IGlpManager) (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#103-115) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- avgAum = (aums[0] + aums[1]) / 2 (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#106)
	- scaleToPrecision(avgAum * 1e18 / glpSupply,30) (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#111)
markdown:
[TokenPrices.glpPrice(IGlpManager)](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L103-L115) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [avgAum = (aums[0] + aums[1]) / 2](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L106)
	- [scaleToPrecision(avgAum * 1e18 / glpSupply,30)](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L111)

description:
OrigamiGmxManager.buyUsdgQuote(uint256,address) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#695-716) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- amountAfterFees = fromAmount * (basisPointsDivisor - feeBasisPoints) / basisPointsDivisor (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#714)
	- usdgAmountOut = gmxVault.adjustForDecimals(amountAfterFees * price / pricePrecision,fromToken,usdg) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#715)
markdown:
[OrigamiGmxManager.buyUsdgQuote(uint256,address)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L695-L716) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [amountAfterFees = fromAmount * (basisPointsDivisor - feeBasisPoints) / basisPointsDivisor](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L714)
	- [usdgAmountOut = gmxVault.adjustForDecimals(amountAfterFees * price / pricePrecision,fromToken,usdg)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L715)

description:
OrigamiGmxManager.getFeeBasisPoints(address,uint256,bool) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#739-785) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- averageDiff = targetAmount (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#780)
	- taxBps = taxBasisPoints * averageDiff / targetAmount (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#783)
	- targetAmount = gmxVault.tokenWeights(_token) * usdgSupply / gmxVault.totalTokenWeights() (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#764-766)
markdown:
[OrigamiGmxManager.getFeeBasisPoints(address,uint256,bool)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L739-L785) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [averageDiff = targetAmount](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L780)
	- [taxBps = taxBasisPoints * averageDiff / targetAmount](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L783)
	- [targetAmount = gmxVault.tokenWeights(_token) * usdgSupply / gmxVault.totalTokenWeights()](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L764-L766)

Reentrancy in RepricingToken.addReserves(uint256) (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#126-129):
	External calls:
	- IERC20(reserveToken).safeTransferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),amount) (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#127)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _addReserves(amount) (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#128)
		- totalReserves += amount (contracts/common/RepricingToken.sol#134)
